channel.title: Machine-id doesn't change in Live Mode?
channel.description:
So the Machine-id doesn’t change in live mode?
> Kicksecure 18.0.8.7
---
**USER Persistent mode:**
``` [user ~]% cat /etc/machine-id 3a0be44995e7efdfce5714979311f238 [user ~]% ```
**live mode USER:**
``` [user ~]% cat /etc/machine-id 3a0be44995e7efdfce5714979311f238 [user ~]% ```
If you notice that my machine-id is not the same as the one in dist-base-files [b08dfa6083e7567a1921a715000001fb](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Kicksecure/dist-base-files/refs/heads/master/etc/machine-id) which is shared by whonix.
Whats going on here? Is something being altered in the install process via GUI installer?

item.title: Machine-id doesn't change in Live Mode?
item.dc:creator: Patrick
item.description:
dist-base-files, installed by default in Kicksecure and Whonix, which ships file /etc/machine-id.

github.com/Kicksecure/dist-base-files

etc/machine-id

master 
b08dfa6083e7567a1921a715000001fb
  • Kicksecure installed: machine-id assigned probably during calamares installation by calamares. [1]
  • Kicksecure ISO: dist-base-files /etc/machine-id
  • Kicksecure VM images: dist-base-files /etc/machine-id
  • Whonix VM images: dist-base-files /etc/machine-id
  • Whonix ISO: … off-topic … → Whonix-Host Operating System Live ISO, Whonix-Host Installer
  • Kicksecure installed: machine-id assigned probably during calamares installation by calamares. [1]

This could be considered a bug.

It’s debatable what the best machine-id for Kicksecure is. Could be argued it should be uninitialized and should be populated at first boot.

[1] https://codeberg.org/Calamares/calamares/src/branch/calamares/src/modules/machineid

Read full topic
item.source: Machine-id doesn't change in Live Mode?

item.title: Machine-id doesn't change in Live Mode?
item.dc:creator: anon92632958
item.description:
So is the Kicksecure Live ISO the only thing sharing the same machine-id as Whonix?

Read full topic
item.source: Machine-id doesn't change in Live Mode?

item.title: Machine-id doesn't change in Live Mode?
item.dc:creator: Patrick
item.description:
Grub Live Machine-id Randomization Feature Support
I want to propose adding a feature for machine-id randomization for Grub Live to be done by a Dracut hook? My Guess is /etc/ and /var/lib/dbus are not populated until pivot_root to the squashfs overlay. If yes then hook would have to run pre_pivot and empty the machine-id : > /etc/machine-id then syslink the new generated machine-id ln -sf /etc/machine-id /var/lib/dbus/machine-id Since people aren’t going to be doing updates in Live Mode I don’t see any conflicts with the previous discussions …

Read full topic
item.source: Machine-id doesn't change in Live Mode?

item.title: Machine-id doesn't change in Live Mode?
item.dc:creator: Patrick
item.description:
Your expectation that machine id does change depending on the boot mode is invalid. There’s no such feature. Persistent mode and live mode share the same filesystem. The former is persistent. The latter is not.

Read full topic
item.source: Machine-id doesn't change in Live Mode?

item.title: Machine-id doesn't change in Live Mode?
item.dc:creator: anon92632958
item.description:
So the Machine-id doesn’t change in live mode?

Kicksecure 18.0.8.7

USER Persistent mode:

[user ~]% cat /etc/machine-id
3a0be44995e7efdfce5714979311f238
[user ~]%

live mode USER:

[user ~]% cat /etc/machine-id
3a0be44995e7efdfce5714979311f238
[user ~]%

If you notice that my machine-id is not the same as the one in dist-base-files b08dfa6083e7567a1921a715000001fb which is shared by whonix.

Whats going on here? Is something being altered in the install process via GUI installer?

Read full topic
item.source: Machine-id doesn't change in Live Mode?
